text.text: Welcome to the Betweenlands Tinker Encyclopedia!
This guide will introduce you to all the new tools and materials added by this mod.

Through the Animator, you can convert ordinary Tinkers' tools into four powerful Betweenlands tools: the Betweenlands Pickaxe, Shovel, Hatchet, and Broadsword. They inherit all stats from their predecessors and are immune to the Betweenlands weakness.
In addition to full tools, you can also convert Tinkers' parts (Tool Rods, Bindings, and Tool Heads) in the Animator to obtain their Betweenlands equivalents.
These parts are only for replacing components in existing Betweenlands tools—they cannot be used to craft tools directly.
Enjoy your journey in the swamps!
